title: Move Zeroes
prompt:
Given an integer array `nums`, move all `0`'s to the end of it while maintaining the relative order of the non-zero elements.

Note that you must do this in-place. Return the modified array.

notesForAI.coreIdea: Use a two-pointer approach. Maintain a 'write' pointer for the next non-zero position. Iterate with a 'read' pointer: when a non-zero is found, swap with the write position and advance both pointers.
commonBugs: Not maintaining relative order of non-zero elements
Creating a new array instead of modifying in-place
